label: agent loop • cancelling during a read-then-write plan blocks the write phase
query: First read src.txt, then read src2.txt, then write a combined summary of both into out.txt. One tool call per turn.
notes: Cancel between the read phase and the write phase: with cancelAfterToolCalls 1 the loop stops after the first read, so the write (out.txt) must never happen — proving cancellation prevents queued side effects, not just future reads. Clean 'cancelled' exit required. Off-CI (needs a model).
